sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Bain Capital Specialty Finance (BCSF) Declares Special Dividend
feed.summary: Bain Capital Specialty Finance (BCSF) has announced a special dividend of $0.15 per share, payable on January 26 to shareholders of record by December 31. The company, an externally managed, closed-end investment company focused on middle-market investments, currently offers an annualized dividend yield of 10.3%. While it shows a robust net margin, its earnings growth has declined, and its valuation metrics present a mixed picture with a P/B suggesting undervaluation but P/E and P/S ratios near historical highs.

feed.title: Chipotle expands in Connecticut, opening two new restaurant locations in Colchester, Darien
feed.summary: Chipotle has opened two new locations in Connecticut, one in Colchester and one in Darien, bringing its total to 44 restaurants in the state. The new Colchester location features a "Chipotlane" for digital orders, a feature included in many of Chipotle's recent openings in Connecticut. The company is actively hiring for 30 positions at each new location.

feed.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT Sets January 2026 Dividend Guidance
feed.summary: ARMOUR Residential REIT (ARR) has announced guidance for a January 2026 monthly cash dividend of $0.24 per common share. The company also disclosed that its external manager will end its voluntary waiver of a portion of the base management fee effective February 1, 2026, which may impact future returns. An AI Analyst from TipRanks rates ARR stock as Neutral due to a mix of financial challenges and strong technical indicators.

feed.title: Analysts See a 19% Upside to Northrop Grumman Corporation (NOC)
feed.summary: Analysts have a consensus Strong Buy rating on Northrop Grumman Corporation (NOC) with a one-year average share price target of $685.31, indicating a 19% upside. This follows recent adjustments by Morgan Stanley, Alembic Global, and Citigroup, with continued bullish sentiment on the aerospace and defense sector. Northrop Grumman is a major defense contractor involved in advanced systems.

feed.title: L3Harris Technologies, Inc. (LHX) Wins $843M Contract For Missile Tracking Satellites
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies, Inc. (LHX) has secured an $843 million contract from the Space Development Agency (SDA) to develop 18 infrared satellites for the Tranche 3 Tracking Layer. These satellites will be part of the SDA's Proliferated Warfighter Space Architecture, aimed at defending against hypersonic and ballistic missiles. This new order adds to previous satellite development for T1 and T2 layers, enhancing the company’s role in national security.

feed.title: Brown & Brown sues Howden and former employees as broker 'raid' swells to 300
feed.summary: Brown & Brown has filed a lawsuit against Howden and 29 individuals after Howden U.S. reportedly hired nearly 300 Brown & Brown employees. This hiring spree is part of Howden's expansion to bolster its employee benefits practice and enter the Northeast and Midwest regions.

feed.title: Labaton Keller Sucharow LLP Files Securities Class Action Against CarMax, Inc. and Certain of Its Executives
feed.summary: Labaton Keller Sucharow LLP has filed a securities class action lawsuit against CarMax, Inc. and certain executives on behalf of the Indiana Public Retirement System. The lawsuit alleges that CarMax misled investors by failing to disclose underperforming loans, inadequate loss reserves, an oversupply of vehicles leading to depreciation, and that sales boosts were due to temporary market conditions. Investors who purchased CarMax securities between June 20, 2025, and November 5, 2025, are encouraged to seek appointment as Lead Plaintiff by January 2, 2026.

feed.title: Celebrating eBay’s Top Sellers of 2025
feed.summary: eBay celebrated its 2025 top sellers with regional events, honoring their entrepreneurial drive and success on the global marketplace. Sellers from various regions, including Eastern Europe, Latin America, the Middle East, India, and Southeast Asia, were recognized for leveraging eBay's tools and support to achieve significant growth and expand their businesses globally. The event highlighted how eBay partnered with sellers every step of the way, helping them adapt, innovate, and thrive.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land, Bolt to build West Texas data centers
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land Corp. (TPL) has partnered with Bolt Data & Energy Inc., co-founded by former Google CEO Eric Schmidt, to develop large-scale data center campuses and supporting infrastructure in West Texas. TPL has invested $50 million into Bolt, which also raised $150 million in capital, aiming to leverage the region's abundant energy resources and TPL's extensive land ownership to create a global hub for AI compute infrastructure. This collaboration seeks to build the world's largest and most efficient data center company by integrating scalable data infrastructure with energy production.

feed.title: Mobile Infrastructure Extends Credit Facility, Declares Preferred Dividends
feed.summary: Mobile Infrastructure Corp (BEEP) has extended its credit facility with Harvest Small Cap Partners funds to March 31, 2026, a related-party transaction involving board co-chair Jeffrey Osher. Concurrently, the company declared monthly cash dividends for December on its Series A and Series 1 preferred stock, payable in January 2026. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates BEEP as Neutral due to significant financial challenges such as ongoing losses and high leverage, despite positive strategic initiatives.

feed.title: US watchdog says F-35s flew half the time in 2024 due to Lockheed maintenance issues
feed.summary: A U.S. watchdog report states that F-35 fighter jets were only available to fly half the time in 2024, falling 17% short of minimum performance requirements, due to maintenance issues by Lockheed Martin. The Pentagon's Office of the Inspector General criticized the lack of accountability for Lockheed Martin's poor performance and identified that the Pentagon paid the company $1.7 billion without economic adjustment despite the aircraft's unavailability. Lockheed Martin has not yet commented on the report.

feed.title: KeyCorp Files Prospectus Supplement for Share Registration
feed.summary: KeyCorp recently filed a prospectus supplement for the registration of 161,968,762 common shares. These shares were issued to The Bank of Nova Scotia under an Investment Agreement, with a filing deadline of December 27, 2025. A legal opinion was also filed as Exhibit 5.1 and incorporated into the Registration Statement.

feed.title: CVB Financial Corp Announces Appointment of New President
feed.summary: CVB Financial Corp (CVBF) announced the appointment of Mr. Jones as President of the company and Citizens, effective upon the consummation of the merger. Mr. Jones has extensive banking experience, previously serving as President & CEO of Heritage Bank. This appointment was disclosed in an SEC 8-K filing on December 23, 2025.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics Redeems 5% Senior Notes, Simplifying Debt
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics (STLD) fully redeemed its $400 million 5.000% Senior Notes due 2026 on December 21, 2025, simplifying its capital structure and reducing debt. This move terminated the related indenture obligations. An analyst has a Buy rating on STLD with a $173.00 price target, and TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates STLD as Outperform due to stable financial performance and strong technical indicators.

feed.title: Edison International Secures $900 Million Term Loan Facility
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX) has secured a new $900 million term loan credit facility, maturing on December 22, 2026, with Wells Fargo Bank leading a syndicate of lenders. This loan aims to enhance liquidity, support debt management, and strengthen banking relationships, allowing the company financial flexibility. The proceeds will be used for general corporate and working capital purposes, including potential debt repayment.

feed.title: KeyCorp files prospectus for 162 million shares issued to Bank of Nova Scotia
feed.summary: KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) announced that it has filed a prospectus supplement for the registration of 161,968,762 common shares issued to The Bank of Nova Scotia. This filing is in accordance with an Investment Agreement dated August 12, 2024, which required KeyCorp to file the prospectus by December 27, 2025. The shares have a par value of $1.00 each.

feed.title: Heritage Commerce Announces Merger Agreement with CVB Financial
feed.summary: Heritage Commerce Corp has entered into a definitive merger agreement to be acquired by CVB Financial Corp. The stock-for-stock deal, unanimously approved by both boards, will see each Heritage share converted into 0.65 shares of CVBF, and Heritage Bank of Commerce will be merged into Citizens Business Bank. The agreement includes provisions for equity awards, leadership changes, stringent closing conditions, and a termination fee of $32.45 million.

feed.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT Keeps Monthly Dividend at $0.24 per Share, Payable Jan. 29 to Holders of Record Jan. 15
feed.summary: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. has announced that it will maintain its monthly dividend at $0.24 per share. This dividend is payable on January 29 to shareholders of record as of January 15. The company specializes in investing in government-sponsored entity and government agency mortgage-backed securities.

feed.title: Dedicated Support from SCE Available to Help Make Claim Submissions Easy for Wildfire Recovery Compensation Program
feed.summary: Southern California Edison (SCE) is offering dedicated support to individuals and businesses impacted by the Eaton Fire through its Wildfire Recovery Compensation Program, with resources available in multiple languages including online guidance, one-on-one assistance, and in-person appointments. The program aims to process claims quickly and deliver fast payments, with many offers already extended and payments made to help the community recover during the holiday season.

feed.title: Digi Power X Details December 11 Shareholder Meeting Filings and Voting Results
feed.summary: Digi Power X (TSE:DGX) held its annual general and special shareholder meeting on December 11, 2025, in Toronto, filing all necessary proxy and voting documents on SEDAR+ and with the SEC, ensuring cross-border governance compliance. These filings cover director elections, auditor appointments, and equity incentive plans, providing transparency for investors. Despite financial challenges and ongoing losses, Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates TSE:DGX as Neutral, noting strong upward technical momentum and potential growth from strategic expansion and revenue diversification.

feed.title: Controversial Chesterfield Natural Gas Plant
feed.summary: Dominion Energy's proposed Chesterfield Energy Reliability Center (CERC), a natural gas plant, has faced significant controversy due to environmental concerns. Despite initial approvals for its construction and associated rate hikes, the State Corporation Commission temporarily suspended the decision following a petition, putting the development process on hold.

feed.title: Henry Schein expects to appoint next CEO by mid-January (HSIC:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Henry Schein (HSIC) announced that it anticipates appointing its new CEO by mid-January. The company's lead director, Philip A. Laskawy, expressed satisfaction with the progress made in the CEO search. This announcement indicates the culmination of their search efforts is near.

feed.title: Levi & Korsinsky Reminds Freeport-McMoRan Inc. Investors of
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP is reminding investors in Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (NYSE: FCX) of a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Freeport-McMoRan made false statements and/or concealed inadequate safety measures at its Grasberg Block Cave mine, leading to heightened risks for workers. Investors who suffered losses between February 15, 2022, and September 24, 2025, have until January 12, 2026, to request to be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Aramco awards Texas-based SLB long-term contract to support unconventional gas production growth
feed.summary: Aramco has awarded Houston-based global technology company SLB a five-year contract to provide stimulation services for its unconventional gas fields. This multi-billion-dollar agreement is part of a larger plan to support one of the world's biggest unconventional gas development programs. The contract involves advanced stimulation, well intervention, frac automation, and digital solutions, crucial for Saudi Arabia's energy diversification and transition efforts.

feed.title: Beyond Meat’s Recent Struggles: What’s Next?
feed.summary: Beyond Meat (BYND) is experiencing significant struggles, with its stock trading down due to heightened scrutiny over plant-based meats, nutritional concerns, and ongoing legal investigations for alleged securities fraud. The company faces financial headwinds, including a large impairment charge, negative profitability, and declining revenue growth. While management is attempting strategic reorganizations, the article emphasizes that fundamental reforms and financial prudence are crucial for its long-term stability and to regain investor confidence.

feed.title: Apple to allow third-party app stores in Brazil to settle iOS case with regulator
feed.summary: Apple will allow third-party app stores and payment processing methods on its iOS operating system in Brazil, settling a three-year antitrust case with CADE. The agreement, which includes a potential R$150 million penalty for non-compliance, responds to a complaint from MercadoLibre regarding Apple's restrictions on digital goods and in-app purchases. While Apple expressed concerns about privacy and security risks, it will implement the changes within 105 days.

feed.title: Stonegate Capital Partners Initiates Coverage on Armour Residential REIT, Inc. (ARR)
feed.summary: Stonegate Capital Partners has initiated coverage on Armour Residential REIT, Inc. (ARR). The company reported significant year-over-year growth in revenues, net income, and diluted EPS, driven by strong interest income and declining interest costs. Stonegate expects this performance to be sustainable, highlighting ARR's 19.3% annualized dividend yield, valuation at a discount to Book Value, and a 7.75% total economic return for the quarter.

feed.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. Announces Guidance for January 2026 Dividend Rate Per Common Share
feed.summary: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. (NYSE: ARR and ARR-PRC) has announced guidance for its January 2026 cash dividend for Common Stock, set at $0.24 per share. The record date for this dividend is January 15, 2026, with the payment date scheduled for January 29, 2026. The company, which invests in residential mortgage-backed securities, maintains its REIT tax status by distributing substantially all its ordinary taxable income.

feed.title: Stonegate Capital Partners Initiates Coverage on Armour Residential REIT, Inc. (ARR)
feed.summary: Stonegate Capital Partners has initiated coverage on Armour Residential REIT, Inc. (NYSE: ARR), highlighting strong financial performance with significant increases in revenues, net income, and diluted EPS. The report notes a 19.3% annualized dividend yield, a valuation discount to book value, and a 7.75% total economic return in the quarter, expecting sustainable performance in the current macro environment.

feed.title: BioMarin to Acquire Amicus Therapeutics for $4.8 Billion
feed.summary: BioMarin Pharmaceutical Inc. announced its definitive agreement to acquire Princeton-based Amicus Therapeutics for $4.8 billion in an all-cash transaction. The acquisition, approved by both companies' boards, is expected to close in Q2 2026, strengthening BioMarin's commercial portfolio with treatments for Fabry and Pompe diseases, and expanding its presence in rare kidney disease research. This merger is anticipated to accelerate BioMarin's revenue growth, diversify its commercial portfolio, and deliver significant shareholder value.

feed.title: Celularity Announces Closing of Financing Transactions
feed.summary: Celularity Inc. announced the closing of financing transactions with Philip A. Barach, securing $10.00 million in gross proceeds with a potential for an additional $2.0 million. This financing, consisting of a senior secured term loan and convertible notes, aims to strengthen Celularity's financial position and support its focus on leveraging its placental-derived platform for healthy aging and performance optimization. The company plans to articulate its corporate strategy more fully in the new year to align scientific capabilities with long-term opportunities in longevity and age-related diseases.

feed.title: Berger Montague PC Investigates Uber Technologies, Inc.'s Board of Directors for Breach of Fiduciary Duty (NYSE: UBER)
feed.summary: Berger Montague PC is investigating the Board of Directors of Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) for potential breaches of fiduciary duties related to alleged failures in oversight of rider safety and driver background checks. Shareholders are encouraged to contact the law firm for more information regarding this ongoing investigation. This inquiry highlights concerns about the company's governance practices regarding critical operational aspects affecting its users.

feed.title: Henry Schein expects to name new CEO by mid-January 2026
feed.summary: Henry Schein Inc. (NASDAQ: HSIC) announced that it expects to appoint its next chief executive officer by mid-January 2026, with the search process nearing completion. Stanley Bergman will continue as CEO and chairman until his successor is in place. The company, which provides healthcare solutions globally, reported sales of $12.7 billion in 2024 and is included in the Fortune 500 and S&P 500 index.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Group Outlines Action Plans For Operational Improvement Following Independent Audits
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group has published the results of independent audits focusing on risk assessments in Medicare Advantage, care services management, and Optum Rx's drug manufacturer discount policies. The audits, conducted by FTI Consulting Inc. and Analysis Group Inc., generally showed positive results but highlighted instances where UnitedHealthcare failed to address prior regulatory audit flags. In response, UHG has outlined 23 action plans to enhance transparency and operational efficiency, including annual policy reviews, new governance for Optum's HouseCalls program, and streamlining processes at Optum Rx.

feed.title: Phillips 66 (PSX) breaks critical uptrend: Retracement setup or reversal signal?
feed.summary: Phillips 66 (PSX) recently broke below a critical uptrend line that had supported its stock price from June to early December. This breakdown typically signals a polarity shift, where former support transforms into new resistance, suggesting a potential short-selling opportunity if the stock rallies to the $134-136 zone. However, bulls might view a decisive reclaim of $136 as a false breakdown or "bear trap," potentially leading to renewed buying interest.

feed.title: Why Paycom (PAYC) Shares Are Sliding Today
feed.summary: Shares of HR software provider Paycom (PAYC) fell 3.5% after Citigroup lowered its price target from $191 to $185, while maintaining a "Neutral" rating. This adjustment signals a slightly less optimistic valuation outlook, contributing to selling pressure. Despite this, the stock had recently gained 3% based on a "Buy" rating and $195 price target from BTIG.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has issued $978,000 in Review Notes linked to the MerQube US Tech+ Vol Advantage Index, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes are designed for early exit at a premium if the Index reaches a Call Value, but investors face risks including potential principal loss due to a 6.0% per annum daily deduction on the Index and a notional financing cost. The notes priced on December 22, 2025, and are expected to settle by December 24, 2025.

feed.title: Henry Schein Provides Update on CEO Search Process
feed.summary: Henry Schein, Inc. announced that it expects to appoint its next CEO by mid-January 2026. Philip A. Laskawy, Lead Director, stated that the search process is nearing completion and a final decision will be made by mid-January, with current CEO Stanley Bergman continuing in his role until then to ensure a smooth transition.

feed.title: Chatham Lodging Trust Announces Sale of Hotel
feed.summary: Chatham Lodging Trust has announced the sale of its 27-year-old, 147-suite Homewood Suites by Hilton Billerica, Ma., for $17.4 million. An approximate $6 million renovation was planned for 2025 but was halted due to the sale. This transaction increases the total proceeds from six hotel sales since December 2024 to approximately $100 million.

feed.title: Cemtrex Completes Registered Direct Offering to Institutional Investor
feed.summary: Cemtrex (CETX) successfully completed a $2 million registered direct offering with an institutional investor on December 23, 2025, issuing approximately 800,000 shares and pre-funded warrants. The company plans to use the net proceeds for general corporate purposes, including working capital and potential acquisitions, aiming to strengthen its balance sheet and support growth initiatives. Despite the positive capital injection, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates CETX as Neutral due to poor financial performance, high leverage, and a bearish technical trend, though regaining Nasdaq compliance provides some support.

feed.title: Bausch Health Cos (NYSE:BHC) Trading Up 4.9% - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: Bausch Health Cos Inc. (NYSE:BHC) saw its shares increase by 4.9% during trading, closing at $7.3350. Analysts have issued varied ratings, with a consensus "Hold" and a price target of $8.67. Several hedge funds have recently adjusted their positions in the company, which operates in ophthalmology and diversified pharmaceutical brands.

feed.title: Investors Buy Large Volume of Call Options on Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX)
feed.summary: Investors recently bought a large volume of call options on Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX), totaling 99,688 options, a 624% increase from the average daily volume. This unusual activity comes amidst varied analyst ratings, with an average price target of $293.13 and some insider selling by the CFO and CEO. The company also recently increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Salesforce gives stock awards to 55 new employees from Regrello deal
feed.summary: Salesforce announced it has granted 222,453 restricted stock units (RSUs) to 55 new employees joining from the Regrello acquisition. These equity awards, made under its 2014 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan, will vest over four years to incentivize and retain the new personnel. This move aims to align the interests of the new employees with Salesforce's long-term success.

feed.title: Applied Materials Stock (AMAT) News and Forecasts for Dec. 23, 2025: Analyst Price Targets Rise on AI Memory Boom, China Risk Still Looms
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) is seeing increased analyst price targets due to optimism surrounding AI-linked wafer fab equipment, particularly in advanced memory and leading-edge foundry, with shares trading around $259. Despite bullish indicators from several analysts, concerns persist regarding the company's exposure to China and U.S. export controls, leading to a mixed outlook among investors. The stock's valuation is a point of contention, with some analysts maintaining "Hold" ratings or even suggesting a "Sell" due to perceived overvaluation, while others argue it remains undervalued compared to peers given its broad market positioning.

feed.title: AbbVie (ABBV) Stock News Today, Dec. 23, 2025: Beyond Botox Pipeline Push, Analyst Targets, and What to Watch Next
feed.summary: AbbVie (ABBV) stock traded slightly higher on December 23, 2025, driven by pipeline advancements in aesthetics and eye care, and ongoing discussions about U.S. drug-pricing policy. Key investor focuses include the "beyond Botox" neurotoxin R&D, comparative analysis with AstraZeneca highlighting the growth of Skyrizi and Rinvoq, and the progress of the ABBV-444 eye-care treatment. The article also covers analyst price targets, the strength of its core immunology products, and ongoing M&A activities influencing its long-term growth and dividend prospects.

feed.title: Kroger Plans $391M Kentucky Distribution Hub
feed.summary: Kroger is establishing a new $391 million distribution hub in Simpson County, Kentucky, expected to create 430 new jobs. This facility will feature automated technologies and will be Kroger's fifth manufacturing and distribution site in Kentucky. The project is eligible for significant state tax incentives.

feed.title: Cemtrex Signs Securities Purchase Agreement With Accredited Institutional Investor
feed.summary: Cemtrex (CETX) has executed a Securities Purchase Agreement with an accredited institutional investor for a registered direct offering. The company issued 330,000 shares of common stock and pre-funded warrants for 470,000 shares, generating $2,000,000 in gross proceeds. These funds are intended to enhance liquidity and support general corporate needs.

feed.title: Chubb Limited Appoints John Depeters as Executive Vice President, Head of Commercial Insurance and Specialty
feed.summary: Chubb Limited has appointed John DePeters as Executive Vice President, Head of Commercial Insurance and Specialty for Chubb Overseas General Insurance (COG). Mr. DePeters, who has over 13 years of insurance experience, will be based in London. This new role will see him leading the commercial and specialty insurance operations for COG.

feed.title: FIS agrees to pay $210M settlement
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) has agreed to a $210 million settlement in a lawsuit filed by investors regarding its 2019 acquisition of Worldpay. Shareholders alleged that FIS and its executives made misleading statements that artificially inflated the company's shares. This settlement follows FIS's subsequent decision to sell a majority stake in Worldpay, ultimately divesting the business for $11.7 billion and later $24.25 billion, after the initial $35 billion acquisition.

feed.title: Clearwater's new two-story Target could spark more retail development
feed.summary: A new two-story Target location is opening in the former Sears at Countryside Mall in Clearwater. This development is anticipated to revitalize the local retail market by attracting new tenants and testing the potential of a single anchor store to rejuvenate a mall. The move could reshape Clearwater's retail landscape.
